jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Aurobindo Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Aurobindo Pharma has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aurobindo Pharma:
Aurobindo Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aurobindo Pharma!
